identity.name: HeyJulia
identity.tagline_primary: Catch a losing job in week 2. Not at closeout.
identity.tagline_secondary: From voice to dashboard — in under a minute.
identity.one_liner: HeyJulia.ai is an AI voice agent that calls your foreman twice a day and turns the conversation into live labor, progress, and photo data in your dashboard. No app. No typing. English or Spanish.
identity.founder_credibility: Built by the founders of iSqFt and STACK
identity.industry: Construction tech (daily-reporting + labor tracking for GCs)

hero.h1: Catch a losing job in week 2. Not at closeout.
hero.subcopy: HeyJulia.ai is an AI voice agent that calls your foreman twice a day and turns the conversation into live labor, progress, and photo data in your dashboard. No app. No typing. English or Spanish.

problem_section.h2: Daily reports were broken the day the iPad showed up.
problem_section.lede: Field teams hate typing. Office teams can't act on reports that arrive late, incomplete, or in three different tools. By the time a losing job shows up in the numbers, the margin is already gone.

rows.title: Late data → Late decisions
rows.body: Reports trickle in the next morning. The day you needed to act has already passed.

rows.title: Thin data → Thin insight
rows.body: A supervisor typing on a phone at 6pm gives you crew count and a sentence. Not hours, quantities, or blockers.

rows.title: Scattered tools → Scattered trust
rows.body: Time tracking in one app. Daily reports in another. Photos in a text thread. No single source of truth.

solution_section.h2: Two calls a day. One clean record of the job.
solution_section.lede: Julia makes two short calls to your foreman, superintendent, or crew lead. She talks in English or Spanish. Everything she captures flows into your dashboard before the crew leaves the site.

cards.title: Morning call
cards.body: Who's on site, when they arrived, what's planned, and what "done" looks like today.

cards.title: Afternoon call
cards.body: Actual hours by crew, quantities installed, issues, deliveries, safety notes, and photos by text.

cards.title: Live dashboard
cards.body: Production rates against your estimate. Schedule updates. Early warnings when a job is trending red.

flow_section.h2: From voice to dashboard — in under a minute.

steps.title: Setup Project
steps.body: Add your project details and superintendent contact information

steps.title: Julia Calls
steps.body: AI agent makes scheduled calls morning and evening

steps.title: Data Captured
steps.body: Hours, progress, issues automatically recorded and processed

steps.title: Live Insights
steps.body: Dashboard updates instantly with progress and budget alerts

demo_section.description: You'll receive a call from our AI agent, Julia. You act as a crew leader and report progress on the roofing plan tasks. After the call, watch the project schedule update instantly with events, quantities and work hours logged.
demo_section.cta_label: Try HeyJulia.ai right now on a sample project.
